# twc_random_string (Resource)

Resource that generates a random string consisting of characters a-zA-Z0-9. The string is generated once on creation and stored in state. Changing symbol_count forces a new resource to be created.


<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `symbol_count` (Number) Number of characters in the generated random string

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `result` (String) Generated random string
